_comment: Terminal Control Area (TMA) boundaries used as predefined coordinate filters. IMPORTANT: the polygons below are APPROXIMATE placeholders traced from the AIP enroute/VFR charts (ENR 6-2, NAPOC TMA VFR) so the filter feature is functional. They are NOT operational boundaries. Replace each geometry with the authoritative vertex list from AIP ENR 2.1 (TMA NAPOC / TMA BUCURESTI). Keep properties.id stable; set approximate=false once authoritative coordinates are in.

properties.name: TMA NAPOC
properties.source: approx. from AIP ENR 6-70 (NAPOC TMA VFR, AIRAC 04/25)

properties.name: TMA BUCUREȘTI
properties.source: approx. from AIP ENR 6-2 (Romania enroute chart, AIRAC 07/21)
